changes: Replaced verbose generic git reference (432 lines) with focused, task-relevant skill (~90 lines)
Added exact commands for git history analysis: rev-list --count, shortlog -sn, log --no-merges --name-only, %as date format
Added explicit rules about writing JSON output to working directory (not inside repo subdirectory)
Added branch operations section with cherry-pick by message grep, tag creation, branch listing
Added JSON writing patterns using node -e and heredoc
Removed irrelevant sections: remote operations, stashing, rebasing, submodules, clean, aliases, tips, workflows
